name: Quacker Jacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Create caramel mixture from the butter/margarine, brown sugar and corn syrup by mixing and simmering in a pot on the stove.
2. Pop the corn.
3. Add the baking soda.
4. Saute peanuts to bring the temperature of the peanuts up to that of the popcorn.
5. Mix in caramel mixture.
